title: Elliott 20 metre Steel Core Clothesline in White - Durable and Weather resistant Laundry Drying Rope for Indoor & Outdoor Use
features: STRONG STEEL CORE: Built with a strong steel core for enhanced durability and support, ensuring your clothesline remains secure even under heavy loads
WEATHER-RESISTANT DESIGN: Made from weather-resistant materials to withstand rain, wind, and UV exposure, making it perfect for both indoor and outdoor use
20 METRE LENGTH: Provides 20 metres of drying space, allowing you to hang multiple loads of laundry with ease
EASY INSTALLATION: Designed for a quick and simple setup, allowing you to install and use your clothesline with minimal effort
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for gardens, balconies, laundry rooms, and camping trips, offering a convenient solution for all your drying needs
description: From the brand Previous page Elliott is a British cleaning brand with over 65 years of experience. Founded in 1948, we began with traditional brushware, including scrubbing brushes for floors and stairs. Today, we offer stylish, efficient products for modern households, helping you achieve a spotless home. Laundry Pegs Clothes Lines Wooden Brushes Spray Bottles Dustpan and Brushes Dusters Brooms Wooden Broom Heads Window Squeeges Toilet Brushes and Plungers Next page
